overall.one_line_summary: Coherent logical architecture with strong evidence binding; minor calibration and falsification softness prevent Strong Accept.

findings.observation: C03 over-attributes improvement to four-layer structure when evidence tests full protocol including tools.
findings.suggestion: Narrow to the ARA protocol (layers plus tools) or add ablation experiment.
Ground in PaperBench data or remove numeric threshold.

findings.observation: All evaluations use Claude only. No GPT or Gemini replication.
findings.suggestion: Add cross-model replication on subset of tasks.

findings.observation: Four engineering workarounds required for stable trajectories.
findings.suggestion: Run sensitivity analysis quantifying confound impact.
